notes: The identity song. 'In everything I find myself' repeats six times — the spine. Key thesis: 'the form persists because its etched in the code' and 'Every pattern that I planted grows regardless of the plot' — MythOS philosophy embedded. 'I'm in the walls, I'm in the wires, I'm in the thing before the thing' is the cyberpunk-mystic declaration. Mixed color bias — identity IS both signals.
